message:
🐛 Add console to version selector configuration

The version selector was showing KubeStellar versions instead of
Console versions when viewing console docs. This adds console to:
- ProjectId type
- CONSOLE_VERSIONS constant
- PROJECTS configuration
- getProjectFromPath URL detection

Also fixes klaude currentVersion to 0.7.1 (was 0.6.0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
